daily: Today, the U.S. revoked authorization for Iranian oil sales following tanker attacks in the Gulf. What is the background of this decision, and what impacts could it have on global oil markets and regional tensions?
headline_seed: U.S. revokes Iran oil sales authorization after tanker attacks
